label: Health Factor Monitor
description: Real-time health factor monitoring across lending positions. Shows oracle vs market rates, spread, and emergency exit trigger.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Loading: React.Suspense in widget-wrapper covers suspend; context always provides hydrated static data (no async loading path).

0.7.note: Empty: emergencyExit.steps uses .map() which is safe on empty array; HF data is a single object always present.

0.8.note: Error: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper catches render errors.

0.9.note: removed unused Eye import from lucide-react.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx (line 89). 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["execution-basic","execution-full"] non-empty. 0.3 availableOn=["defi"] non-empty. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 Loading: React.Suspense in widget-wrapper covers suspend; context always provides hydrated static data (no async loading path). 0.7 Empty: emergencyExit.steps uses .map() which is safe on empty array; HF data is a single object always present. 0.8 Error: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper catches render errors. 0.9 Fixed: removed unused Eye import from lucide-react.

1.1.note: Widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook only — no inline fetches or direct imports.

1.2.note: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 188) and filters by scope.

1.3.note: Org filter: hasDefiDesk derived from organizationIds — controls adjustedTokenBalances, adjustedLendingProtocols, getBridgeRoutes. healthFactorDashboard and emergencyExit are strategy-level constants not org-scoped (correct — HF is per-strategy, not per-org).

1.4.note: Client filter: no client-level filtering in context; this widget operates at strategy/protocol level where client cascade is N/A.

1.5.note: Strategy filter: scopeStrategyIds applied to tradeHistory (line 211). HF dashboard is a single strategy snapshot — strategy-level scoping N/A for this specific field.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds → hasDefiDesk=true, full data returned. Empty strategyIds → all tradeHistory returned.

1.7.note: MOCK_HEALTH_FACTOR and MOCK_EMERGENCY_EXIT are mock fixture constants in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (context responsibility, not widget). Widget itself has no direct mock imports.

l1.notes: 1.1 Widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook only — no inline fetches or direct imports. 1.2 defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 188) and filters by scope. 1.3 Org filter: hasDefiDesk derived from organizationIds — controls adjustedTokenBalances, adjustedLendingProtocols, getBridgeRoutes. healthFactorDashboard and emergencyExit are strategy-level constants not org-scoped (correct — HF is per-strategy, not per-org). 1.4 Client filter: no client-level filtering in context; this widget operates at strategy/protocol level where client cascade is N/A. 1.5 Strategy filter: scopeStrategyIds applied to tradeHistory (line 211). HF dashboard is a single strategy snapshot — strategy-level scoping N/A for this specific field. 1.6 Empty organizationIds → hasDefiDesk=true, full data returned. Empty strategyIds → all tradeHistory returned. 1.7 MOCK_HEALTH_FACTOR and MOCK_EMERGENCY_EXIT are mock fixture constants in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (context responsibility, not widget). Widget itself has no direct mock imports.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4: N/A (not an order entry form). Emergency exit is a special case.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — HF monitor + emergency exit. Exit should be gated in paper mode.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but scope.mode not checked before emergencyExit call.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: emergency exit button should warn/disable in paper mode.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval. N/A for mock; production should poll or stream HF.

l4.notes: 4.7/4.8: Human walkthrough of emergency exit dialog required.

4.1.note: Emergency Exit button at line 199 has onClick handler. Confirm dialog onClick at line 205. No dead buttons.

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6: Human walkthrough required — emergency exit is a critical path.

5.1.note: Target strategies: CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED, YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING — health factor monitoring critical for leveraged lending positions to prevent liquidation.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests after L5 sign-off.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. Data via useDeFiData().

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline objects in memo deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px] at lines 55, 76, 189 migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Button, Badge, Dialog from components/ui/*. CollapsibleSection, KpiStrip from shared.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Human: emergency exit dialog keyboard check required.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending --text-label-micro token. 8.5: human resize test required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Health factor monitoring + emergency exit is a unique risk management widget — not a detail of any action widget.

dataContract.notes: HF should stream via WebSocket in production — liquidation risk requires sub-second latency. Emergency exit REST call to liquidation service.

gaps.notes: Emergency exit not wired to real liquidation service — mock only.
scope.mode not checked before emergencyExit — paper mode guard missing.

findings.description: Unused Eye import from lucide-react was present in the widget file.

healthFactorDashboard and emergencyExit mock data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (imported by context, not widget). These are strategy-specific snapshots with no org/client filter applied — acceptable for current mock stage; will need live data wiring in L2/L3.
scope.mode not checked before emergencyExit call — paper/batch mode should prevent real exit.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: defi-health-factor-widget.tsx:55,76,189 text-[10px] for dense label sizing.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro Tailwind utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.
